title: Improving Safety Culture During the Construction Phase of Nuclear New Build Projects
text:
Improving Safety Culture During the Construction Phase of Nuclear New Build Projects

We requested a scoping study to provide a greater understanding on how nuclear new build can promote, strengthen and maintain a positive safety culture in GB and will consider the following questions:

What has already been done and works effectively in relation to building a strong safety culture for
nuclear new builds, mega construction projects, or other comparable domains?

What are the gaps or challenges in developing a strong, homogeneous safety culture for nuclear new builds in Great Britain?

What actions could be recommended to enhance safety culture, safety performance and quality for
nuclear new builds in Great Britain?


                            Published
                        


                            20 March 2026
